text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap, Tamamo Cross, and... Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen will see these three superstars
clash.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After overcoming a year filled with troubles,
Super Creek reaches the grand event and takes
her stand.
